title: NXPI vs. MPWR: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: Monolithic Power's (MPWR) Q1 Earnings Beat on Solid Revenues
text: Monolithic Power (MPWR) witnessed a top-line expansion year over year in the first quarter 2023 driven by strong growth in Automotive, Communications, Storage and Computing verticals.

title: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (MPWR) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Bernie Blegen - VP & CFO Michael Hsing - Founder, Chairman, President & CEO Conference Call Participants Tore Svanberg - Stifel, Nicolaus & Company Nathaniel Bolton - Needham & Company Matthew Ramsay - TD Cowen Richard Schafer - Oppenheimer Ross Seymore - Deutsche Bank William Stein - Truist Securities Operator Welcome, everyone, to the MPS' First Quarter 2023 Earnings Webinar. My name is Jennifer Cunningham, and I will be the moderator for this webinar.

title: Monolithic Power (MPWR) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Monolithic Power (MPWR) came out with quarterly earnings of $3 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.99 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.45 per share a year ago.

title: Monolithic Power stock powers down more than 10% on disappointing outlook
text: Monolithic Power Systems Inc. MPWR, -1.54% shares fell in the extended session Thursday after the chip-based electronics component maker appeared to follow in the footsteps of many semiconductor-related company this earnings season and reported a slight beat on earnings and a disappointing outlook for the current quarter. Monolithic shares dropped nearly 11% after hours, adding to a 1.5% decline in the regular session to close at $458.93.

title: Will Top-Line Expansion Aid Monolithic Power (MPWR) Q1 Earnings?
text: Monolithic Power (MPWR) is likely to report higher revenues year over year backed by its diverse portfolio, expansion in high-growth emerging markets and adaptability in dynamic market conditions.
